school.zh: 北京理工大学 · 机车学院动力所第二党支部

bullets.zh: 负责党支部日常建设与党员教育管理，组织政治学习、主题党日等党务活动，发挥党员先锋模范作用，积极推动支部建设与科研工作深度融合。
bullets.en: Responsible for day-to-day branch building and member education; organised political-study sessions and themed party-day activities, and drove deep integration of branch work with research.

school.zh: 武汉理工大学汽车工程学院 · 学生会
school.en: WHUT · School of Automotive Eng. Student Union

bullets.zh: 主导学生会内部制度改革与组织架构优化，统筹策划迎新、高校辩论赛等各类活动共 24 场，组织学院运动会并协调多部门协作，积累了丰富的大型活动策划与执行经验。
bullets.en: Led internal reform and restructuring of the student union; planned 24 events including orientation and inter-university debates, and coordinated multi-department collaboration for the college sports meet — building strong large-event planning and execution experience.

bullets.zh: 2021 年暑假赴武汉市蔡甸区柏木村柏木小学开展暑期支教活动，提升了语言沟通与表达能力。
bullets.en: Volunteered as a summer teacher at Baimu Primary School (Caidian District, Wuhan) in 2021, strengthening communication and presentation skills.
